Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is Continued to November 3, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than October 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
